use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node, TreeCursor};

fn walk_and_extract(node: Node, source: &str) {
    let name = node.child_by_field_name("name");
    let value = node.child_by_field_name("value");
    let body = node.child_by_field_name("body");
    let params = node.child_by_field_name("parameters");
    let return_type = node.child_by_field_name("return_type");
    let condition = node.child_by_field_name("condition");
    let consequence = node.child_by_field_name("consequence");

    if let Some(name) = name {
        let text = &source[name.start_byte()..name.end_byte()];
        println!("name: {}", text);
    }

    for i in 0..node.child_count() {
        if let Some(child) = node.child(i) {
            let _ = child.child_by_field_name("name");
            let _ = child.child_by_field_name("value");
            let _ = child.child_by_field_name("type");
            walk_and_extract(child, source);
        }
    }
}

fn extract_function_info(node: Node, source: &str) {
    let name = node.child_by_field_name("name").unwrap();
    let params = node.child_by_field_name("parameters").unwrap();
    let body = node.child_by_field_name("body").unwrap();
    let return_type = node.child_by_field_name("return_type");

    let name_text = &source[name.start_byte()..name.end_byte()];
    let params_text = &source[params.start_byte()..params.end_byte()];
    println!("fn {}({})", name_text, params_text);
}
